form.formComment: Last start 6th of 9 at Kyneton Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1461m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Crazy Town carrying 59.5kg at $19. The start before that 9th of 12 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on February 26 over 1100m, 7 len behind Buvelot carrying 59.5kg at $26. Yet to place in five starts so hard to tip with confidence.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over-raced in the early and middle stages.
Restrained from its wide barrier and settled towards the rear of the field.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after about 18 months 5th of 14 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1300m, 1.75 len behind Power And The Beat with 59.5kg at $31. Previously second-up ran last of 8 at Sha Tin Rating 40 on September 28 2024 over 1600m, 10 len behind Casa Legend with 61kg at $35. Former HK galloper who can really kick on with that first run out of the way.

form.formComment: Last start 5th of 11 at Sale Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1400m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Lowestoft carrying 59.5kg at $18. The run before that sat on the speed throughout before fading second last of 8 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 12 over 1400m, 11 len behind Titan's Spirit with 59.5kg at $41. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding making debut by Almanzor out of Vanity Queen. Ran 3rd in a jump-out at Pakenham on March 31. Looks a stayer off the jumpouts, so this a suitable trip for the debut and could possie up from the inside gate.

form.formComment: At the latest run got back early 7th of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1400m, on heavy track; 6 len behind On The Prowl with 59kg at $7.50. Before that came home strongly from last on the turn; 2nd of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 12 over 1200m, 0.8 len behind Chowdown carrying 59kg at $10. Been racing in much stronger events than this and low draw presents the chance to hit back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping with Hurry Up Poppy.
Raced four wide without cover throughout.
Raced keenly in the early stages.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when second last of 7 at Seymour 3yo Mdn-Sw on October 12 over 1200m, 9 len behind Ludlum carrying 58kg at $10. Didn't do a whole lot on debut but should be better for it and there's a long tail to this race.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming of 8 at Sale 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1400m, slow going 13 len behind Boomeroo carrying 58kg at $101. Second-up 2nd in a small field at Swift's Creek Pic-Mdn-Sw on April 5 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Elite Pete with 65kg at $3.40. May need one more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Eased down from the 200m.

form.formComment: At debut, 4th of 8 at Ararat 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 30 over 1206m, 2.25 len behind Miss Ellaneous carrying 58kg at $11. Better for that run and looks well placed.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid in under pressure in the straight.
Raced three wide without cover throughout.
Laid in under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: She is resuming after a seven months break. Finished off last preparation tenth of 12 at Hamilton Mdn-Sw September 15 over 1400m, soft track; 9 len behind Simply Sassy with 55kg at $61. On debut ninth of 11 at Swan Hill Mdn-Sw August 24 over 1600m, 11 len behind Myers Delight with 55kg at $26. Avoca jumpout 2nd placing was an improvement, but still keen to see again at the races.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation second last of 10 at Bendigo 3yo Mdn-Sw September 17 over 1500m, soft track; 11 len behind Obvious carrying 56kg at $51. On debut seventh of 12 at Bairnsdale Mdn-Sw September 7 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Somebody Told Me carrying 55kg at $7.50. Might be better off following this outing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped at the start. Raced keenly in the early stages when being restrained.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly making debut by Highland Reel out of Energy Raider. Ran 3rd in a jump-out at Pakenham on March 31. Jumpouts this time have been OK but outside gate makes it tough.
